content.text: Added the `GET /users/:id` route to `src/server.ts:15`. It matches `/users/<id>`, looks up the user by id, and returns 200 with the user as JSON when found. Any non-match (including no user with that id) falls through to the existing 404 not-found response. Everything else is untouched.
